title: dasyaulis malabaricus
intro: Dasyaulis malabaricus, also known as Malabar night-flowering jasmine, is a flowering plant species native to India. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Dasyaulis malabaricus include its potential to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menstrual cramps and other female reproductive disorders. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which are believed to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
